jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
